ol.li: SQ8 provides the best balance for general use, maintaining high fidelity (>0.92 recall) with a fixed 4x memory reduction.
Product Quantization (PQ) is required for billion-scale sets, offering massive (>100x) compression.
Recall Drop: PQ-M8 exhibits a ~15% recall loss compared to FP32, necessitating a Re-ranking Phase (M5) using exact distances on the final candidate set to recover accuracy.
Performance: ADC distance computation on PQ data is ~100x faster than full-precision L2 calculation.
